message:
test(fcp-conformance, fcp-mesh): typed evidence artifacts for crash recovery and degraded availability, replace fcp-testkit LogCapture

fcp-conformance/integration_scenarios.rs:
- Add typed evidence structs: ScenarioAssertionEvidence,
  CrashRecovery{Replay,State,Artifact}Evidence,
  DegradedAvailability{Replay,State,Artifact}Evidence.
- Add build_crash_recovery_artifact_bundle() and
  build_degraded_availability_artifact_bundle() for structured
  JSON-serializable recovery evidence.
- Scenario constants CRASH_RECOVERY_SCENARIO/CONTRACT_ID and
  DEGRADED_AVAILABILITY_SCENARIO/CONTRACT_ID.
- scenario_assertions() helper extracts typed assertion evidence
  from log entries.

fcp-mesh/tests/mesh_integration.rs:
- Replace fcp-testkit::LogCapture with self-contained LogCapture
  implementation using tracing-subscriber JSON layer + Arc<Mutex>
  buffer.  Includes E2E log schema validation via jsonschema crate.
- Add validate_e2e_log_entry() and e2e_log_validator().

fcp-mesh/Cargo.toml: Add jsonschema and tracing-subscriber
dev-dependencies; remove fcp-testkit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
